introSection: Jungle Mouse (Japanese: ジャングルマウス) is a steel wild mouse roller coaster currently located at Hamanako Pal Pal in Hamamatsu, Shizuoka, Japan.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Red track and light blue supports.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: A rider broke their sternum after a ride on the Jungle Mouse on 7 March 2022. The ride would be closed the next day, reopening when no fault of the ride was found.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Jungle Mouse on the park's website (In Japanese)

fullText:
Jungle Mouse (Japanese: ジャングルマウス) is a steel wild mouse roller coaster currently located at Hamanako Pal Pal in Hamamatsu, Shizuoka, Japan.



Red track and light blue supports.



A rider broke their sternum after a ride on the Jungle Mouse on 7 March 2022. The ride would be closed the next day, reopening when no fault of the ride was found.


 * Jungle Mouse on the park's website (In Japanese)
